knowledge.magicrituals.first_trace.title: First Trace
knowledge.magicrituals.first_trace.desc: You notice a faint residue of magic and learn how to recognize it.
knowledge.magicrituals.fragile_echo.desc: Some traces do not persist. They require careful capture before fading.
knowledge.magicrituals.trace_needle.desc: A tool that can sense and align with nearby traces.
knowledge.magicrituals.trace_of_flow.des: Water carries memory of movement and leaves a readable imprint.
knowledge.magicrituals.settling.title: Settling
knowledge.magicrituals.settling.desc: A raw trace must be settled before it can be interpreted.
knowledge.magicrituals.ritual_chalk.desc: Chalk is not power; it is a boundary that guides power.
knowledge.magicrituals.listening_pattern: A proper pattern does not command. It listens and invites.
knowledge.magicrituals.raincaller.title: Raincaller
knowledge.magicrituals.raincaller.desc: Call rain by completing a water pattern and offering the right materials.
knowledge.magicrituals.storm_marks.title: Storm Marks
knowledge.magicrituals.storm_marks.desc: Storms leave stronger traces that can anchor further rituals.
knowledge.magicrituals.trace_of_heat.des: Heat exposes hidden remnants and prepares the path forward.
knowledge.magicrituals.ashen_resonance.d: Ash carries stabilized echoes that can be refined into knowledge.
knowledge.magicrituals.clear_skies.title: Clear Skies
knowledge.magicrituals.clear_skies.desc: Dispel rain and thunder by completing the heat-bound pattern.
magicrituals.configuration.title: Magic Rituals Configs
